title: Write ('W')
text: Write ('W') Insert a new record. Description Insert a new record in the table. If the DBMS supports PRAs, Fetch the address of the inserted record. Build the primary key of the inserted record. Add the primary key and, if available, the PRA to the hitlist by means of the uaddhit service function. From Uniface Preconditions realized by Uniface—the table that Write is requested for is open. Table 1. Information Available from Uniface Data Structure->Element Description uctrl->TMEnabled Indicates whether the connector is TM-controlled. uctrl->udrv Points to the connector workspace if a workspace was requested in the Info request. uctrl->udrvini Unique identification of the current logon path. uctrl->iobuf Points to the general I/O buffer which contains the data to insert. uctrl->udatlen Length of the data pointed to by uctrl->iobuf . uctrl->ufldlst Field list that describes all the fields in the table. uctrl->vsfnr If vsfnr equals 0, this indicates that segmented fields do not have to be inserted, otherwise they do have to be inserted. To Uniface Table 2. Connector Request Return Values Value Description 0 Commit was successful. -6 Exceptional error. -7 Write failed due to duplicate primary key. -9 I/O server logon error. -16 DBMS reported network error. When the connector request return value is less than 0, an error code must be supplied in uctrl->udrverr . Service Functions ubldprm — Build the primary key. uaddhit — Add a record to the hitlist. Extra information Uniface assumes that the DBMS checks the uniqueness of keys in unique indexes (Uniface primary key and candidate keys). When the connector has to insert segmented fields ( vsfnr is not equal to 0), the segments of the segmented field have to be obtained directly from the Uniface kernel using the ugetblob service function. TM-Controlled Connectors TM-controlled connectors are not allowed to begin, commit or rollback transactions. Related Links ugetblob Get segmented data from the Uniface kernel. uctrl Exchanges general information between Uniface and the connector, and describes a table. uaddhit Adds an entry to the Uniface hitlist, or updates an existing one.
